upheld: ADR-001 master/worker split: n/a; the diff only changes tests/st/kill_timer.h and does not alter master, worker, metadata authority, or data-plane responsibilities.
ADR-002 pluggable cluster metadata backend: n/a; the diff does not touch ETCD, Metastore, hash-ring initialization, deployment flags, or metadata storage.
ADR-003 consistent hash-ring placement: n/a; the diff does not touch placement, token generation, routing, or scale-event behavior.
ADR-004 performance-first optional reliability: n/a; the diff does not change WriteMode, L2 persistence, object durability, or cache data semantics.
